title: About Me
content:
Hi there! I'm Varun — a Software Engineer and M.Sc. graduate in Computer Science from the University of North Texas.

I build thoughtful full-stack applications that blend polished UI, strong performance, and scalable backend architecture. My work often includes:
  • React + TypeScript interfaces
  • Node.js / Express APIs
  • Cloud-ready services and real-time features

I love solving high-impact problems, especially when they involve:
  • real-time systems
  • AI/ML-powered user experiences
  • resilient infrastructure that scales with confidence

Outside work, I recharge with volleyball, fantasy novels, and experimenting with new recipes in the kitchen.

If you want to build something modern, reliable, and a little bold — let's connect!
